title: allium glaciale
intro: Allium glaciale, also known as Glacier Onion or Alpine Allium, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. This perennial plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to treat respiratory issues and as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Allium glaciale include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Allium glaciale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its effects.
